name: linen-planner-desktop
description: Linen Paper Co. — desktop app (Electron wrapper).
author: Linen Paper Co.

scripts.dist:win:portable: node sync.mjs && node icons.mjs && node portable.mjs
scripts.dist:win: node sync.mjs && node icons.mjs && electron-builder --win dir
scripts.dist:win:installer: node sync.mjs && node icons.mjs && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: node sync.mjs && node icons.mjs && electron-builder --mac dmg
